seoTitle: Caulfield East vs Caulfield North — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Caulfield East and Caulfield North. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Caulfield East vs Caulfield North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caulfield East and Caulfield North.
heading: Caulfield East vs Caulfield North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caulfield East, Victoria and Caulfield North, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caulfield East has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Caulfield North (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caulfield East or Caulfield North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caulfield East has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Caulfield North scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caulfield East scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Caulfield North scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caulfield East or Caulfield North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caulfield East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
